main.description: Publishes an Are.na channel as a gallery on /curating. The record key is the site-facing slug (e.g. weird-dogs-only → /curating/weird-dogs-only).

title.description: Optional title override; falls back to the channel title on are.na.

description.description: Optional description override; falls back to the channel description.

order.description: Sort order on the /curating index — lower sorts first.

enabled.description: When false, the gallery is hidden from the site.
